name: Battle Eye: Mark II
description: Throws Battle Eye: Mark II forward. Deploys on landing, projecting an illusion that taunts nearby enemies for 3 seconds.Remains active for 10 seconds.Cooldown: 30 seconds.
advancements: Draws in nearby enemies when Battle Eye: Mark II deploys or disappears.
Increases final damage by 9% while Battle Eye: Mark II is deployed.
Allows reactivation while Battle Eye: Mark II is active, teleporting its location and destroying it in the process.
Reduces frost damage received by 2%, even if not deployed. Unavailable in Apex League.
Increases final damage by an extra 6% while Battle Eye: Mark II is deployed.
